notes: NI Electric Keys / Session Keys Electric — electric piano collection covering Rhodes Mark I/II, Wurlitzer, CP-80. Runs in Kontakt. CC 11 Expression controls dynamics. Tremolo rate/depth are the most musical real-time controls.

Expression.description: Expression — dynamics control (velocity swell in real time)

Modulation.description: Modulation wheel — typically controls tremolo depth

Quick Control 1.description: Instrument Model — selects between Rhodes Mk I, Mk II, Wurlitzer, CP-80 (varies by patch)

Quick Control 2.description: Bell/Tine Character — balance between bell-like attack and body

Quick Control 4.description: Tremolo Rate — speed of built-in tremolo

Quick Control 5.description: Tremolo Depth — intensity of tremolo effect
